description_long: This rifle features a tan-colored polymer body with a black adjustable stock and a prominent black rail system along the top for mounting optics or accessories. The barrel is metallic silver and ends with a multi-pronged flash hider, while the magazine is a detachable box type, finished in a dark gray. The pistol grip and trigger guard are ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling, and the stock is padded for recoil absorption. The rifle is equipped with iron sights, and the overall design suggests a modern tactical firearm suitable for urban environments. The combination of polymer and metal materials gives it a robust yet lightweight appearance.
description: A modern tan and black tactical rifle with a detachable magazine, rail system, and metallic barrel with a flash hider.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle with a multi-pronged flash hider and the narrow profile of the rail system.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tan polymer body, black rail, detachable magazine, and padded stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black adjustable stock and the alignment of the rail system.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, trigger, and ergonomic grip details.
